name: BBQ Rum Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap ribs in double thickness of foil and bake for 1 1/2 hours at 350°F.
2. Unwrap and drain drippings.
3. Combine all ingredients and pour over ribs. Marinate at room temperature for 1 hour.
4. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, basting with sauce, or grill for 30 minutes, turning and basting.
